data.title: BID rose above 0.098USDT, with the largest increase since listing on LBank reaching 253%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News LBank market shows that BID rose above 0.098USDT, reaching a maximum of 0.0989USDT, and is now quoted at 0.09USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 221%. Since the launch of LBank, the current maximum increase has reached 253%, and the current market value is approximately US$23.3 million.

data.title: Gate.io will launch BROCCOLIF3B and BR perpetual contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Gate.io will launch BROCCOLIF3B and BR perpetual contract real-time trading (USDT settlement) at 21:00 (UTC+8) on March 20, 2025, supporting 1-50 times leverage.

data.title: AscendEX will launch Be For FWX (B4FWX)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News AscendEX (formerly BitMax) will launch Be For FWX (B4FWX) for the first time at 10:00 on March 21, opening the B4FWX/USDT trading pair, and recharge is now open.
AscendEX (formerly BitMax) is the first and most comprehensive trading platform for Memecoin on the entire network. The Meme Research Institute team under the platform selects high-quality Memes for listing based on on-chain data and project background. The platform's Memecoin first listing rate is as high as 80%.

data.title: BR will be listed on Bitget PoolX and CandyBomb, earning 4,425,000 BR airdrops
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget PoolX is about to launch the BR project, with a total prize pool of 1.25 million BR. The lock-up channel is open from 22:00 on March 20 to 22:00 on March 27 (UTC+8), details are as follows:
PoolX:
Total airdrop: 1,250,000 BR
Personal lock-up limit: 6,000,000 BR
In addition, you can participate in the CandyBomb special event, top up and trade to share the BR airdrop, with a total prize pool of 3,175,000 BR, and the event is open from 22:00 on March 20 to 22:00 on March 27 (UTC+8).
BR/USDT spot trading is open from 21:00 on March 20 (UTC+8)

data.title: Bitcoin Experiences Slight Decline Below $85,000
data.description: According to PANews, Bitcoin has recently fallen below the $85,000 mark, with the current price reported at $84,927 per coin. Despite this drop, the cryptocurrency has seen a daily increase of 0.22%.

data.title: Binance Introduces Nillion (NIL) on Launchpool: Earn NIL by Staking BNB, FDUSD, and USDC
data.description: Binance has announced Nillion (NIL) as the 65th project on Binance Launchpool, a decentralized network designed to enable secure data processing and storage with privacy-preserving technology. Users can farm NIL tokens by staking BNB, FDUSD, and USDC for a three-day period starting March 21, 2025, at 00:00 UTC.NIL Launch & Listing DetailsTrading Start Date: March 24, 2025, at 13:00 UTCAvailable Trading Pairs: NIL/USDT, NIL/BNB, NIL/FDUSD, NIL/USDC, NIL/TRYInitial Circulating Supply: 195,150,000 NIL (19.52% of total supply)Total Token Supply: 1,000,000,000 NILInflation Rate: 1% yearly (governed emission)Launchpool Rewards: 35,000,000 NIL (3.5% of total supply)NIL Farming Pool Allocation & Staking DetailsFarming Period: March 21, 2025 (00:00 UTC) – March 23, 2025 (23:59 UTC)Total Daily Rewards: 11,666,666 NILHourly Hard Cap per User:BNB Pool: 38,888 NILFDUSD Pool: 4,861 NILUSDC Pool: 4,861 NILReward Distribution Across PoolsDateTotal Daily RewardsBNB PoolFDUSD PoolUSDC Pool2025-03-21 - 2025-03-2311,666,666 NIL9,333,333 NIL1,166,666 NIL1,166,666 NILNote: Users must complete Binance KYC verification to participate. The Nillion blockchain explorer will be available at the public launch.How to Participate in NIL FarmingLock BNB, FDUSD, or USDC in Binance Launchpool (links available within 12 hours).Earn NIL tokens based on your staking amount.NIL tokens will be distributed proportionally according to user contributions.

data.title: Bitget Seed launches PVS (PVS)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget Seed launched the project PVS (PVS), a utility token launched by Paraverse on Pump.fun, with a core narrative focusing on 3D rendering.
Bitget Seed is a brand new on-chain asset trading platform that focuses on exploring high-potential projects in the market. Bitget Seed will select 0-5 high-quality tokens every day.

data.title: In the past 4 hours, the entire network has exploded more than 40 million US dollars, mainly in long orders
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Coinglass data shows that in the past 4 hours, the entire network has been liquidated for $42.5471 million, of which long orders have been liquidated for $34.3029 million and short orders have been liquidated for $8.2442 million.

data.title: Ethereum Falls Below $2000 Amid Daily Decline
data.description: According to PANews, Ethereum (ETH) has recently dropped below the $2000 mark, currently trading at $1999.69 per coin. This represents a daily decrease of 2.42%.

data.title: Binance will list Nillion (NIL) and open trading pairs
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance will list Nillion (NIL) at 13:00 (UTC) on March 24, 2025, and open NIL/USDT, NIL/BNB, NIL/FDUSD, NIL/USDC and NIL/TRY trading pairs. NIL's Launchpool mining will start at 00:00 (UTC) on March 21, 2025. Users can participate in mining by locking BNB, FDUSD and USDC to receive NIL airdrop rewards.
